completion_criteria_checked: A local deterministic backup/restore helper exists for an explicit protected PCC file set.
The helper can create a timestamped restore point in a non-canonical backup location without depending on git.
The helper can restore a chosen snapshot of the protected files back into place.
The change stays within the approved V1 scope and preserves local deterministic behavior.
The helper remains passive and non-gating; it does not block task completion or become workflow enforcement.
Claude returns evidence in .cockpit/result/worker-result.md using the required format.
risks: Restore-point retention/pruning is not implemented yet, so .cockpit/backups can grow over time.
The protected file set is partly hardcoded, so future protected non-script files would require a script update.
Restore overwrites files directly and does not yet offer a dry-run or diff-preview mode.
summary: Claude completed the bounded pcc-v1-010 task within scope by adding a deterministic protected-file backup and restore helper with a git-ignored non-canonical backup location.
next_action: Pause at the natural break, archive the verified backup helper task, and choose the next bounded follow-on task.
